/ Who we are

Audio obsessives, building for yours.

SoundWave started with a simple frustration: great-sounding headphones were either bulky, ugly, or priced out of reach. So a small team of acoustic engineers set out to fix all three at once.

Today we tune every driver by ear in our own lab, and we don't ship a product until it passes a listening test we'd stake our name on.
